popularStory.headline: Bertha of Burgundy
popularStory.description: Bertha was the daughter of Conrad the Peaceful, King of Burgundy and his wife Matilda, daughter of Louis IV, King of France and Gerberga of Saxony. She was named for her father's mother, Bertha of Swa …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Berthe de Bourgogne於0967年3月27日出生在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o阿爾斯時，她的父親Conrad III de Bourgogne42歲，母親Mathilde de France23歲。她於大約0979年與Eudes Ier de Blois在法國布格結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1010年1月16日在法國崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦享年42歲，埋葬在法國崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Berthe de Bourgogne于0967年3月27日出生在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o阿爾斯时，她的父亲Conrad III de Bourgogne42岁，母亲Mathilde de France23岁。她于大约0979年与Eudes Ier de Blois在法国布格结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1010年1月16日在法国崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦享年42岁，埋葬在法国崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourgogne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bourgoin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphee, Alyre, Andre, Armand, Aurore, Celina, Emile, Gilberte, Jacques, Laurent, Lucienne, Olivier.

variant of Bourgouin (and, in North America, an altered form of this), a habitational name for someone from Burgundy (Old French Bourgogne), a region of eastern France having Dijon as its center. The area was invaded by the Burgundii, an ancient Germanic tribe from whom it takes its name, in about AD 480. The duchy of Burgundy, created in 877 by Charles II, King of the Western Franks, was extremely powerful in the later Middle Ages, especially under Philip the Bold (1342–1404; duke from 1363). Compare Bourgoyne and Bourguignon .

nameMeanings.name: Berthe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Berthe de Bourgogne was born on 27 March 0967, in Arles, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, her father, Conrad III de Bourgogne, was 42 and her mother, Mathilde de France, was 23. She married Eudes Ier de Blois about 0979, in Burgundy, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 16 January 1010, in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, at the age of 42, and was buried in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Berthe de Bourgogne est née le 27 mars 0967, à Arles, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, son père, Conrad III de Bourgogne, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de France, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Eudes Ier de Blois environ 0979, à Bourgogne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 janvier 1010, à Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterrée à Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Berthe de Bourgogne am 27. März 0967 in Arles, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Conrad III de Bourgogne 42 und ihre Mutter Mathilde de France 23. Sie hat um 0979 in Burgund, Frankreich Eudes Ier de Blois geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. Januar 1010 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich und wurde in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Berthe de Bourgogne è nata il il 27 marzo 0967 nel Arles, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, sua padre, Conrad III de Bourgogne, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Mathilde de France, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Eudes Ier de Blois circa 0979, nel Bourgogne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 16 gennaio 1010, nel Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolta a Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Berthe de Bourgogneが0967年3月27日にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルボウチェス-ドウ-ルhoンアルレスで生まれた時，父Conrad III de Bourgogneは42歳，母Mathilde de Franceは23歳であった。約0979年にフランスボウルゴグンでEudes Ier de Bloisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1010年1月16日にフランスセントアロイル-エト-チャーブロイスで42歳で死去し，フランスセントアロイル-エト-チャーブロイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Berthe de Bourgogne(이)가 0967년 3월 27일 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 부체스-드-ho니 알레스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Conrad III de Bourgogne(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde de France(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 0979년 프랑스 부르고그니에서 Eudes Ier de Blois(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1010년 1월 16일 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 블로이스에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 블로이스에 묻혔다.

mn.27 March 967–16 January 1010: 0967 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 27–1010 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 16

pt.27 March 967–16 January 1010: 27 de março de 0967–16 de janeiro de 1010
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Berthe de Bourgogne nasceu em 27 de março de 0967, em Arles, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França, seu pai, Conrad III de Bourgogne, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de France, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Eudes Ier de Blois aproximadamente 0979, em Bourgogne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de janeiro de 1010, em Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França, com 42 anos, e foi sepultada em Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Berthe de Bourgogne родилась 27 марта 0967 г. в местности арльс, боучес-ду-рoн, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция, её отцу по имени Conrad III de Bourgogne было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de France, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Eudes Ier de Blois около 0979 г. в местности бургогн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 16 января 1010 г. в местности блоис, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция в возрасте 42 лет и была похоронена в местности блоис, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция.

es.27 March 967–16 January 1010: 27 de marzo de 0967–16 de enero de 1010
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Berthe de Bourgogne nació el 27 de marzo de 0967, en Arles, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, su papá, Conrad III de Bourgogne, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Mathilde de France, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Eudes Ier de Blois aproximadamente 0979, en Bourgogne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 16 de enero de 1010, en Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultada en Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia.
